pendingApplications.address: Site Of And Land At St Marys Church Hall 25 East Street And 1 And 1A New Road Shoreham-by-sea West Sussex
pendingApplications.proposal: Change of use of to provide a mixed use with a new church/community hall and Parish office, and 7 no. residential units (comprising 5 houses and 2 flats). Includes partial demolition at rear, replacement roof and new rear roof extensions, rear extension, new glazing and door/window openings and removal of shopfronts
